task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Admin Panel — Moderate User-Submitted Content** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: admin_tool. Shape: auth-gated admin app for reviewing + moderating user-submitted records. The CORE is that EVERY mutation endpoint has `requires role 'admin'` (not just `requires login`). An admin can list pending reviews, approve them, reject them. NOT a generic CRUD — the admin role gating is the differentiator. Include: POST /api/reviews (public — anyone can submit), GET /api/reviews/pending (ad
final_source:
build for javascript backend

allow signup and login
owner is 'admin@example.com'

create a Reviews table:
  author_email, required
  content, required, min 1, max 500
  status, default 'pending'
  created_at_date, auto

when user sends review to /api/reviews:
  validate review:
    author_email must not be empty
    content must not be empty
  saved = save review to Reviews
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/reviews/pending:
  requires role 'admin'
  reviews = get all Reviews where status is 'pending'
  send back reviews

when user calls PUT /api/reviews/:id/approve:
  requires role 'admin'
  review = look up Review with this id
  review's status is 'approved'
  save review to Reviews
  send back review

when user calls PUT /api/reviews/:id/reject:
  requires role 'admin'
  review = look up Review with this id
  review's status is 'rejected'
  save review to Reviews
  send back review
